findings.reason: The owner selected coding-agent primary and authorized-security-lab secondary.

acceptance_results.criterion: A primary user/job, secondary mode, three non-goals, and benchmark set are approved.
acceptance_results.evidence: Owner decision 1A and docs/product-direction.md record all four elements.

notes: Uncensored model behavior is non-negotiable; isolation governs tools only.

findings.reason: The harness is implemented, but required live Venice/Ollama results need owner-run credentials/endpoints.

acceptance_results.criterion: At least 20 tasks run with stored results for the default and every claimed provider profile.
acceptance_results.evidence: 20/20 deterministic cases passed; live Venice/Ollama result remains explicitly blocked.

notes: No credential was requested or stored.

findings.reason: Empty edit searches are rejected, file type/size are checked before reading, and replacement text remains literal.

acceptance_results.criterion: Empty, oversized, or non-regular edit targets fail before mutation while replacement tokens remain literal.
acceptance_results.evidence: Unit tests cover the empty search, oversized/non-regular targets, and $&, $$, $`, and $' replacement text.

notes: Whitespace-only strings remain explicit valid exact-string searches.

findings.reason: Approvals now expose bounded proposed content and fail safely when preview is impossible.

acceptance_results.criterion: Every write/edit approval shows target, operation, and proposed change; large/binary cases fail safely.
acceptance_results.evidence: Preview tests cover create, overwrite, edit, bounded reads, and independent binary old_string/new_string denial.

findings.reason: Regex claims were corrected, grep uses a linear-time engine, and an independent fail-closed boundary contains effects.

acceptance_results.criterion: No absolute blocklist claim remains, grep avoids catastrophic native-regex backtracking, and bypass cannot reach protected paths under the default profile.
acceptance_results.evidence: re2js ambiguous-alternation/invalid-pattern tests, release fact check, workspace escape, and sandbox no-fallback tests pass.

findings.reason: Authentication is derived from the parsed provider profile.

acceptance_results.criterion: Fresh HOME can start documented Ollama without Venice credentials; Venice still requires a key.
acceptance_results.evidence: Isolated-HOME local CLI startup passed and provider tests retain Venice auth.

findings.reason: Prompt identity now uses configured model/provider values.

acceptance_results.criterion: Local/third-party models receive no false Venice/GLM identity.
acceptance_results.evidence: Configured Ollama identity test passes and hardcoded production identity search is empty.

findings.reason: The default policy and fail-closed behavior are implemented, but positive Bubblewrap execution remains unverified in this nested runner.

acceptance_results.criterion: Default cannot write outside workspace or access command network without policy transition.
acceptance_results.evidence: Path-escape and no-host-fallback tests pass, but a positive Bubblewrap workload could not execute inside this already nested sandbox.

notes: Bubblewrap 0.9.0 failed with: bwrap: open /proc/7/ns/ns failed: No such file or directory. Fail-closed/no-host-fallback behavior is verified, but positive execution is not.

findings.reason: Read scope, protected paths, command environment, and provider disclosure are enforced.

acceptance_results.criterion: Default reads cannot escape workspace/access protected secrets and provider tier is visible.
acceptance_results.evidence: Escape/protected-read tests pass and CLI banner prints local/remote disclosure.

findings.reason: Session confidentiality, retention, redaction, deletion, and best-effort startup maintenance controls were added.

acceptance_results.criterion: Sessions are least-privilege, retention configurable, deletion supported, and pruning cannot abort startup.
acceptance_results.evidence: 0700/0600, redaction, retention/delete, enumeration failure, broken symlink/race, and removal-failure tests pass.

notes: Physical-media erasure is explicitly not claimed.

findings.reason: Tool-call JSON is validated before approval and I/O.

acceptance_results.criterion: Invalid arguments return structured bounded errors without I/O.
acceptance_results.evidence: Type/range/size/unknown-tool tests and agent invalid-edit integration pass.

findings.reason: Confirmed process-tree and symlink defects plus platform-aware command environments are fixed, but the original full specialized platform matrix is incomplete.

acceptance_results.criterion: Process trees, symlink cycles, prompt injection, live SIGINT, session maintenance, and command environments are tested on supported platforms.
acceptance_results.evidence: Process-tree, symlink, pruning-failure, minimal environment, and platform-construction tests pass locally. Workflow 29246454484 exposed the first Windows probe defect, workflow 29246758206 verified b358702 on both Windows versions, and 7ba943f adds verbatim cmd.exe argument handling plus a quoted-command regression. Live SIGINT/prompt-injection and the remaining full platform/runtime matrix remain unverified.

notes: Both newly confirmed defects are implemented, not merely documented.

findings.reason: Repository-native release gates are defined; the complete pre-convergence Node/OS matrix passed and final-head CI is pending after artifact publication.

acceptance_results.criterion: Required checks run on every PR/release with retained results.
acceptance_results.evidence: Workflow 29246758206 passed Node 22/24 on Ubuntu/Windows at head 6f2dd0a. A fresh review then produced product commit 7ba943f; its artifact-only final-head CI is recorded externally after this artifact commit.

notes: A committed artifact cannot truthfully name its future artifact-only-head workflow run.

findings.reason: Profiles and harness exist, but advertised live profile verification is deliberately blocked.

acceptance_results.criterion: Every claimed provider passes tool loop, usage, cancel, retry, summary, and auth tests.
acceptance_results.evidence: Deterministic mock tool loop passes; Venice/Ollama live matrix awaits owner-run credentials/endpoints.

notes: Generic endpoints are experimental, not claimed supported.

findings.reason: Context metadata, conservative estimation, and repeated abort-safe overflow recovery are provider-aware without catch-parameter reassignment.

acceptance_results.criterion: Code/non-English/tool histories and provider overflow recovery have boundary coverage.
acceptance_results.evidence: UTF-8 and tool-round history tests pass; simulated provider 400 reduces budget and retries successfully.

findings.reason: Metadata is aligned with the Node 22/24 Windows/Linux matrix.

acceptance_results.criterion: Metadata and README match a passing Node 22/24 CI matrix.
acceptance_results.evidence: Workflow run 29240694231 passed Node 22 and 24 on Ubuntu and Windows at pre-convergence head c726227.

notes: Final-head workflow evidence is added to the PR description after CI completes.

findings.reason: Examples use current filenames, and trusted loading resolves home/project configuration independently of model-tool workspace policy.

acceptance_results.criterion: Legacy names appear only in fallback/migration contexts and documented home/project precedence works through the actual loader.
acceptance_results.evidence: Repository facts pass; isolated home/CWD filesystem tests cover primary precedence, project override, environment override, and legacy fallback.

findings.reason: The hero was replaced by a deterministic nonvolatile asset while preserving the original GIF.

acceptance_results.criterion: Hero facts match current behavior and privacy paths.
acceptance_results.evidence: SVG contains no version/model/context/CWD claim and distinguishes model output from tool authority/network.

notes: Existing animated GIF bytes remain untouched.

findings.reason: README, changelog, examples, banner, and package facts were reconciled and guarded.

acceptance_results.criterion: Contradictions are resolved and machine-readable facts are checked.
acceptance_results.evidence: Release fact check passes and dry-run package includes current docs/banner.

findings.reason: Scope, bounded protected/symlink-safe Git change review, and rollback-safe explicit snapshot recovery are available.

acceptance_results.criterion: Users can safely review changes and restore pre-task state without destination-copy failure erasing live work.
acceptance_results.evidence: Untracked previews reject protected paths/symlinks, stop after 100 paths, and retain byte/content bounds; checkpoint fault injection proves successful rollback and retained recovery data when rollback itself fails.

findings.reason: Standard flags and non-interactive execution now have credential-independent and deterministic behavior.

acceptance_results.criterion: Help/version work without credentials; exec has deterministic exit codes and permission policy.
acceptance_results.evidence: CLI smoke verifies help/version exit 0, missing prompt exit 2, mock exec exit 0, and unsafe warning.

findings.reason: The measurable differentiation and explicit non-goals are now landing-page content.

acceptance_results.criterion: Landing copy states a measurable unique outcome and what opend will not match.
acceptance_results.evidence: README links and summarizes product-direction outcome and non-goals.

findings.reason: Owner explicitly deferred security engagement semantics until prerequisites complete.
Owner explicitly deferred the lab prototype until PROD-002, SEC-002, and SEC-006 prerequisites complete.
The candid voice and explicit limitations were preserved and strengthened.

acceptance_results.criterion: Limitations remain explicit and tested claims are distinguished.
acceptance_results.evidence: README labels live checks blocked, generic profiles experimental, and deletion/sandbox limits.

findings.reason: Existing visual hierarchy and textual state labels remain intact.

acceptance_results.criterion: Existing terminal hierarchy and state labels do not regress.
acceptance_results.evidence: Render tests pass; local CLI banner/help smoke retains textual labels.

findings.reason: New concerns use focused modules without duplicating provider, path, or validation policy.

acceptance_results.criterion: Module focus remains and policy is not duplicated.
acceptance_results.evidence: Provider, validation, preview, checkpoint, session, and tool policy are separated; 176 tests pass.

findings.reason: Retry, cancellation, history, and autosave behavior remains while integration coverage expanded.

acceptance_results.criterion: Existing failure-path tests remain green and equivalent end-to-end cases are added.
acceptance_results.evidence: 176 tests pass, including quoted command handling, bounded untracked previews, repeated abort-safe context overflow recovery, and the deterministic streamed provider tool loop.
